index.title: Dalai Eej | Heritage Site & Resort at Lake Khövsgöl, Mongolia
index.description: Looking for places to stay in Khövsgöl Province? Discover our #1 best value lodge. Enjoy a scenic view sauna, complimentary breakfast, and Bradt Guide-featured hospitality.

story.title: Our Heritage & Story | Dalai Eej Resort
story.description: Three generations of family stewardship at Dalai Eej — from pioneer camp to a lakeside refuge on Lake Khövsgöl.

restaurant.title: Food & Beverage | Dalai Eej Resort
restaurant.description: Lakeside dining at Dalai Eej — open-fire hearth, sunset deck, and Mongolian flavours on Lake Khövsgöl.

catalogue.title: Resort Journal | Dalai Eej 2026 Archive
catalogue.description: An editorial exploration of the hearth, the sanctuary, and the spirit of Khövsgöl. Browse the 2026 resort journal.

contact.title: Contact Us | Dalai Eej Resort
contact.description: Plan your journey to Dalai Eej — Mergen's Ridge, Haichin Am, eastern shore of Lake Khövsgöl, 13 km from Khatgal.

gettingHere.title: How We Get to Lake Khövsgöl | Dalai Eej Resort
gettingHere.description: A curated guide on traveling from Ulaanbaatar to Lake Khövsgöl. Discover domestic flight details, scenic overland routes, and private transfer information.
gettingHere.openGraphTitle: The Journey to Lake Khövsgöl | Dalai Eej Resort
gettingHere.openGraphDescription: Whether you prefer a quick domestic flight to Murun or a scenic drive across the Mongolian steppe, discover the best ways to reach our shores.

almanac.title: The Almanac | A Guide to the Northern Frontier | Dalai Eej Resort
almanac.description: Field notes and historical archives on Lake Khövsgöl — from the steppe to the taiga, Mörön to Khatgal, and the ancient divide of the northern frontier.
almanac.openGraphDescription: A multi-chapter field guide to the northern frontier of Lake Khövsgöl — travel, history, and ecology before you reach our shores.
almanac.openGraphImageAlt: Lake Khövsgöl and the northern frontier at Dalai Eej Resort

murun.description: Discover Mörön—the mid-century charm of Khövsgöl's provincial capital, the legend of the north's first aviator, and why locals call the lake Dalai Eej.
murun.ogImageAlt: Mörön Airport terminal, noted for its mid-century aesthetic

borders-and-industry.metaTitle: The Making of the North: Borders & Industry
borders-and-industry.description: From the Zasagt Khan Aimag to Khatgal's Qing border post and Mongolia's first Soviet wool factory—the geopolitical history of Khövsgöl.
borders-and-industry.ogImageAlt: Historical photograph from Khatgal and the Khövsgöl region

forest-and-steppe.metaTitle: The Forest and the Steppe: An Ancient Divide
forest-and-steppe.description: Lake Khövsgöl sits on Asia's most enduring ecological border—the tension between the Buddhist steppe and the Shamanic taiga.
forest-and-steppe.ogImageAlt: Landscape at the edge of the steppe and Siberian taiga

khovsgol-and-baikal.metaTitle: Two Lakes, One Empire: Khövsgöl and Baikal
khovsgol-and-baikal.description: How the Treaty of Kyakhta severed Khövsgöl from its geological sister Lake Baikal—and why their 20th-century destinies diverged so dramatically.
khovsgol-and-baikal.ogImageAlt: Lake Khövsgöl and the northern shoreline at Dalai Eej

fam.title: FAM Tour Application | Dalai Eej Resort
fam.description: Tour operators and travel agencies: apply for a complimentary familiarization trip to experience Dalai Eej Resort firsthand.

hero.title: A Sanctuary on the Shoreline
hero.subtitle: Situated on the pristine shores of Lake Khövsgöl, Dalai Eej offers a refuge of comfort in the heart of the National Park.

items.yurts: Heritage Cabins & Yurts with Lake Views

dining.title: Flavors of the Steppe
dining.desc: Experience warm Mongolian hospitality. From hearty Khorkhog to fresh European favorites, our restaurant serves delicious meals prepared with local ingredients. Enjoy your morning coffee while watching the sunrise over the lake.

activities.title: Adventures on the Blue Pearl
activities.desc: The lake is your playground. Charter a motorboat to the islands, hike the surrounding larch forests, or experience the nomadic lifestyle on a guided horse trek through the valley.

relaxation.title: Disconnect to Reconnect
relaxation.desc: Far from the city lights and noise. Spend your evenings by a crackling bonfire, gazing at the Milky Way, or relaxing in our wood-fired sauna after a day of exploration.

testimonials.title: Guest Experiences
testimonials.subtitle: What our guests say
testimonials.heritage: Trusted by leaders, executives, and families since 1998.

review1.text: A peaceful, lovely stay on the quieter side of the lake. Family-run, with walking trails, a private sauna at the water's edge, and great food.
review1.author: Michael R.

review2.text: Maria was overwhelmed. Had a wonderful time with you and the family. Bless you.
review2.author: Werner & Maria

review3.text: The hospitality of the owner and staff was the most wonderful thing. I spent a quiet, peaceful time — a wonderful memory of Mongolia.
review3.author: Makoto

review4.text: Three unforgettable days with my partner. The setting beside the lake, the warmth of the owners, the quiet afternoons — easily the most memorable trip we've ever had.
review4.author: Billy P.

checkin.title: Check-In / Check-Out
checkin.desc: Check-In: 14:00 | Check-Out: 11:00. Early check-in and late check-out may be available upon request.

cancellation.title: Cancellations
cancellation.desc: Flexible cancellation up to 14 days prior to arrival. Cancellations within 14 days are subject to one night's charge.

quiet.title: Quiet Hours
quiet.desc: 23:00 - 07:00 to maintain the peace of the National Park and respect for fellow guests.

pets.title: Pet Policy
pets.desc: Pets are welcome on leashes in outdoor areas. Please inform us in advance if traveling with pets.

footer.bio:
A quiet refuge on Lake Khövsgöl's eastern shore.
Wooden cabins, deep waters, slow days.
Northern Mongolia.
footer.address: Mergen's Ridge, eastern Lake Khövsgöl shore, Khövsgöl Province, Mongolia

almanacPage.title: A Guide to the Northern Frontier
almanacPage.seriesLead: A multi-chapter field guide—travel logistics, provincial history, and the ecology of the north—published in order before you reach our shores.
almanacPage.intro1: Lake Khövsgöl is not merely a destination; it is a geographic and cultural fault line.
almanacPage.intro2: To travel to the Khaich Valley is to step into a region where the open Central Asian steppe abruptly ends and the dense Siberian taiga begins. It is a landscape that has been shaped by the sweeping territories of the Zasagt Khan, the border administration of the Qing Dynasty, the heavy industry of Soviet socialism, and the ancient, unyielding traditions of the forest tribes.
almanacPage.intro3: Read the chapters in sequence, or jump to the place or era that draws you in. Each installment is written to stand alone—and to deepen your sense of where you are going.

rooms.title: Our Heritage Stays
rooms.subtitle: Choose from our selection of wood-fired cabins and suites

grandSuite.title: Grand Peninsula Suite
grandSuite.subtitle: The resort's premier residence
grandSuite.description: Designed for those seeking a shared sanctuary, this suite offers our most commanding vantage point. Panoramic windows frame the lake, ensuring the heritage of the Blue Pearl is always in view.
features: Access to shared hot showers nearby

familyCabin.title: Family Ensuite Cabin
familyCabin.subtitle: Generous space for groups
familyCabin.description: A generous cabin designed for groups. Offers the convenience of private facilities with a secluded veranda overlooking the larch forests.
features: Choice of wood stove or electric heating
Access to shared hot showers nearby

comfortCabin.title: Comfort Ensuite Cabin
comfortCabin.subtitle: Rustic charm with modern privacy
comfortCabin.description: A secluded retreat balancing rustic charm with essential privacy. Perfect for couples or small families who value their own space.
features: Choice of wood stove or electric heating
Access to shared hot showers nearby

standardCabin.title: Standard Lakeside Cabin
standardCabin.subtitle: Our heritage experience
standardCabin.description: Ideally positioned in the heart of the resort, these authentic wood-fired cabins offer a classic Khövsgöl stay. Located on level ground just steps from the dining lodge.
features: Access to shared toilets and hot showers

lodgeRoom.title: The Lodge Room
lodgeRoom.subtitle: Accessible and carefree
lodgeRoom.description: Situated within the main lodge, these rooms offer a temperate, maintenance-free refuge without the need for a wood stove. Ideal for those prioritizing convenience.
features: Access to shared toilets and hot showers

camping.title: Peninsula Camping
camping.subtitle: Secure private grounds
camping.bedding: Dedicated sites for Tents or Vehicles
camping.description: Pitch your tent or park your vehicle on our manicured shoreline grounds. Enjoy the resort lifestyle while sleeping under the stars.
features: Unlimited access to hot showers & fresh water
Full access to restaurant and bar
